message:
fix: address 5 security/reliability issues from deep code review

Dependency Override Type Confusion (bd-3aeo):
- Replace .expect() panics with debug_assert! + graceful fallback
- In release builds, falls back to normal resolution on type mismatch
- Panics in debug builds to catch bugs during development

IP Rate Limiting Spoofability (bd-u9gw):
- Add RemoteAddr extension type for secure peer address handling
- Add ConnectedIpKeyExtractor that uses actual TCP connection IP
- Add TrustedProxyIpKeyExtractor with CIDR-based trust validation
- Document security implications of X-Forwarded-For header trust

CORS Spec Compliance (bd-l1qe):
- Verify implementation correctly echoes origin when credentials enabled
- Add security documentation explaining wildcard + credentials rules
- Add explicit spec compliance tests for credentials mode

Phone Validation (bd-apwl):
- Improve validation with structural checks:
  - Leading + only allowed at start
  - Balanced parentheses with content inside
  - No consecutive separators (-, .)
  - No leading/trailing separators
- Add comprehensive edge case tests

Circular Dependency Detection (bd-276p):
- Document why panics are used (configuration errors, type safety)
- Improve panic messages with visual formatting and debugging hints
- Add #[cold] and #[inline(never)] hints for better codegen
- Add helper functions for consistent error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
